title: Channel state information with denoising mechanisms
abstract: A method, apparatus and computer program is described comprising: receiving configuration information relating to a device of a wireless communication system; determining activation and distribution of channel state information error processing modules based, at least in part, on the received configuration information and setting a channel state information processing mode of operation accordingly; providing a mode of operation message defining a channel state information processing mode of operation for use by the device; and receiving channel state information from the device in accordance with the defined mode of operation.
claims:
Claims Claims 1. An apparatus comprising: means for receiving configuration information relating to a device of a wireless communication system, said configuration information including channel state information acquisition capabilities of the device and channel state information processing modes of operation supported by the device; means for determining activation and distribution of one or more channel state information error processing modules based, at least in part, on the received configuration information and setting a channel state information processing mode of operation accordingly; means for providing a mode of operation message, said mode of operation message defining a channel state information processing mode of operation for use by the device; and means for receiving channel state information from the device in accordance with the defined mode of operation. 2. An apparatus as claimed in claim 1, wherein the channel state information processing mode of operation includes at least one of: a first or energy efficient mode; a second or moderate energy mode; and a third or high energy mode. 3. An apparatus as claimed in claim 1 or claim 2, wherein the channel state information error processing modules comprise at least one of: an error detection module that identifies errors in a codeword received from the device over said channel; a first error correction module that corrects errors detected in the codeword received from the device over said channel; and a second error correction module that corrects for errors in a codeword generated at the device resulting from errors in channel estimation. 4. An apparatus as claimed in any one of claims 1 to 3, further comprising: means for receiving a suggested channel state information processing mode of operation from the device, wherein said mode of operation message includes an indication of whether or not the suggested mode of operation is accepted. 5. An apparatus as claimed in any one of the preceding claims, further comprising: means for rescheduling transmission of channel state information from the device in the event that an error is said channel state information is identified. 6. An apparatus as claimed in any one of the preceding claims, further comprising: means for correcting the received channel state information in the event that an error is said channels state information is identified. . An apparatus as claimed in any one of the preceding claims, wherein the apparatus is a network node of the wireless communication system. 8. A device comprising: means for providing, to a network node of a wireless communication system, configuration information relating to the device, wherein said configuration information includes channel state information acquisition capabilities of the device and channel state information processing modes of operation supported by the device; means for receiving a mode of operation message from the network node; means for generating channel state information in accordance with a channel state information processing mode of operation defined by the mode of operation message; and means for providing the generated channel state information to the network node. 9. A device as claimed in claim 8, further comprising: means for providing a suggested channel state information processing mode of operation to the network node, wherein said mode of operation message includes an indication of whether or not the suggested mode of operation is accepted. 10. A device as claimed in claim 8 or claim 9, wherein the channel state information processing mode of operation includes at least one of: a first or energy efficient mode; a second or moderate energy mode; and a third or high energy mode. 11. A device as claimed in any one of claims 8 to 10, further comprising: 

 means for activating and distributing one or more channel state information error processing modules based, at least in part, on said mode of operation message. 12. A device as claimed in any one of claims 8 to 11, wherein the device is a user device of the mobile communication system. 13. A method comprising: receiving configuration information relating to a device of a wireless communication system, said configuration information including channel state information acquisition capabilities of the device and channel state information processing modes of operation supported by the device; determining activation and distribution of one or more channel state information error processing modules based, at least in part, on the received configuration information and setting a channel state information processing mode of operation accordingly; providing a mode of operation message, said mode of operation message defining a channel state information processing mode of operation for use by the device; and receiving channel state information from the device in accordance with the defined mode of operation. 14. A method comprising: providing, to a network node of a wireless communication system, configuration information relating to a device, wherein said configuration information includes channel state information acquisition capabilities of the device and channel state information processing modes of operation supported by the device; receiving a mode of operation message from the network node; generating channel state information in accordance with a channel state information processing mode of operation defined by the mode of operation message; and providing the generated channel state information to the network node. 15. A computer program comprising instructions which, when executed by an apparatus, cause the apparatus to: 

 receive configuration information relating to a device of the wireless communication system, said configuration information including channel state information acquisition capabilities of the device and channel state information processing modes of operation supported by the device; determine activation and distribution of channel state information error processing modules based, at least in part, on the received configuration information and setting a channel state information processing mode of operation accordingly; provide a mode of operation message, said mode of operation message defining a channel state information processing mode of operation for use by the device; and receive channel state information from the device in accordance with the defined mode of operation.
